name: Synthetic data generation framework for quality control automation in gravure printing

description: arXiv:2607.21577v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quality control in printing, particularly in rotogravure printing, still depends on slow, costly, and subjective manual inspection. Automated surface defect detection is critical for maintaining high-quality standards in rotogravure printing. Deep learning models give prospects for automation. However, training robust deep learning models, such...
author: Korota Ars\`ene Coulibaly, Mohamed Hamlich, Khalid Hmali, Andrea Trombin
